name: Lyrilusc - Bird Sanctuary
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＬＬ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>リリカル・ルスキニア</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－バード・サンクチュアリ
desc: You can target 2 Winged Beast Xyz Monsters you control; attach 1 of those monsters to the other as material. (Transfer its materials to that monster.) If you control an Xyz Monster with 3 or more materials: You can draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Lyrilusc - Bird Sanctuary" once per turn.
eff: You can target 2 Winged Beast Xyz Monsters you control; attach 1 of those monsters to the other as material. (Transfer its materials to that monster.) If you control an Xyz Monster with 3 or more materials: You can draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Lyrilusc - Bird Sanctuary" once per turn.

action: Attaches from your field as Xyz Material
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
